key.name: work-interval
key.description: How long the user works before a break begins. Defaults to 25 minutes.

key.name: break-duration
key.description: How long each break lasts. Defaults to 5 minutes.

key.name: postpone-allowance
key.summary: Number of postponements allowed per cycle
key.description: How many times a break may be postponed before it must be taken. Zero disables postponing.

key.name: postpone-duration
key.description: How long a break is delayed each time it is postponed. Defaults to 2 minutes.

key.name: pre-break-warning
key.description: How long before a break to show the warning notification. Zero disables the warning.

key.name: autostart
key.description: Whether Respite runs as a background daemon when the user logs in.
